front: Poem: opens "Row after row with strict impunity / The headstones yield their names to the element" in a cemetery with recurring image of flying leaves
back: Ode to the Confederate Dead (Allen Tate)

front: Poem: describes "inexhaustible bodies that are not / Dead, but feed the grass"
back: Ode to the Confederate Dead (Allen Tate)

front: Poem: explained in essay Narcissus as Narcissus
back: Ode to the Confederate Dead (Allen Tate)

front: Poem: title echoed by Robert Lowell's "For the Union Dead"
back: Ode to the Confederate Dead (Allen Tate)

front: Author: Southern Agrarian who co-authored manifesto I'll Take My Stand
Author: wrote biographies of Stonewall Jackson and Jefferson Davis
